Query.Join: F.PROCESS_NUMBER = W.WARRANT_NUMBER AND F.ISSUING_COURT = W.ISSUED_BY AND F.ALLOCATION_DATE >= W.WARRANT_ISSUE_DATE AND F.PROCESS_TYPE = 'W' AND F.DELETED_FLAG != 'Y'

( ( P.PAYMENT_FOR = 'FOREIGN WARRANT' AND P.SUBJECT_NO = W.LOCAL_WARRANT_NUMBER AND P.ENFORCEMENT_COURT_CODE = W.CURRENTLY_OWNED_BY AND P.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' AND P.RD_DATE IS NULL ) OR ( P.PAYMENT_FOR = 'HOME WARRANT' AND P.SUBJECT_NO = W.WARRANT_NUMBER AND P.ENFORCEMENT_COURT_CODE = W.ISSUED_BY AND P.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' AND P.RD_DATE IS NULL ) )
WR.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' AND WR.RETURN_CODE = RC.RETURN_CODE AND RC.RETURN_TYPE = 'F'

J.CASE_NUMBER = W.CASE_NUMBER and J.AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = W.DEF1_PARTY_ROLE_CODE and J.AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO = W.DEF1_CASE_PARTY_NO and (W.REP_PARTY_ROLE_CODE, W.REP_CASE_PARTY_NO) IN ((SELECT IP.PARTY_ROLE_CODE , IP.CASE_PARTY_NO FROM INFAVOUR_PARTIES IP WHERE IP.JUDG_SEQ = J.JUDG_SEQ ) UNION ALL (SELECT CPR2CPR.CPR_B_PARTY_ROLE_CODE , CPR2CPR.CPR_B_CASE_PARTY_NO FROM INFAVOUR_PARTIES IP2 , CPR_TO_CPR_RELATIONSHIP CPR2CPR WHERE IP2.JUDG_SEQ = J.JUDG_SEQ AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_CASE_NUMBER = W.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = IP2.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_CASE_PARTY_NO = IP2.CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR2CPR.DELETED_FLAG = 'N' ) )

J.CASE_NUMBER = W.CASE_NUMBER and J.AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = W.DEF2_PARTY_ROLE_CODE and J.AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO = W.DEF2_CASE_PARTY_NO and (W.REP_PARTY_ROLE_CODE, W.REP_CASE_PARTY_NO) IN ((SELECT IP.PARTY_ROLE_CODE , IP.CASE_PARTY_NO FROM INFAVOUR_PARTIES IP WHERE IP.JUDG_SEQ = J.JUDG_SEQ ) UNION ALL (SELECT CPR2CPR.CPR_B_PARTY_ROLE_CODE , CPR2CPR.CPR_B_CASE_PARTY_NO FROM INFAVOUR_PARTIES IP2 , CPR_TO_CPR_RELATIONSHIP CPR2CPR WHERE IP2.JUDG_SEQ = J.JUDG_SEQ AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_CASE_NUMBER = W.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = IP2.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_CASE_PARTY_NO = IP2.CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR2CPR.DELETED_FLAG = 'N' ) )
CPR.CASE_NUMBER = W.CASE_NUMBER and CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = W.REP_PARTY_ROLE_CODE and CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO = W.REP_CASE_PARTY_NO
CPR.CASE_NUMBER = W.CASE_NUMBER and CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = W.DEF1_PARTY_ROLE_CODE and CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO = W.DEF1_CASE_PARTY_NO
CPR.CASE_NUMBER = W.CASE_NUMBER and CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = W.DEF2_PARTY_ROLE_CODE and CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO = W.DEF2_CASE_PARTY_NO
